name: GEN+ AI Command Center Component Base
dataPolicy: MOCK GEN+ - conectar a API real

components.purpose: Dark executive shell with smart sidebar, top context and command trigger.
Demo Mode / Cliente Real switch enforcing ISO 19650 and PDPL boundaries.
Decision KPI with value, delta, risk level and business implication.
Physical progress vs valued progress vs planned curve for PM BIM/VDC.
Critical risk matrix for clashes, RFIs, permits, cost and schedule.
AgentFlow, THESIA and VisionPro execution status with owner and next step.
Ranked CEO/PM decisions with value at stake and direct action buttons.
Team capacity load, burnout signal and resource imbalance.
Ctrl-K / Cmd-K action launcher with contextual AI suggestions.
Evidence-backed AI recommendation with human confirmation.
Project selector showing SPI, CPI, physical progress, RFIs and blockers.
Hybrid operational activity board preview for next iteration.
